subcodes.first_line: This is a Book We have sent down unto one of Our handmaidens who hath hearkened unto My call, and attained unto My days, and perceived the fragrance of My Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزلناه لامه من امائی التی سمعت ندائی و فازت بایامی و وجدت عرف ظهوری من
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
